data.body:
Implementation handoff — ready for review.

Branch: frac-27-apply-story (off frac-26-audit-story).
Commits: 4 (lattice catchup + 3 src/ commits).
Diff: 12 lines changed across 3 src/ files; no src/index.css change; no out-of-scope edits.

Migrations executed (per audit doc rows):
- StoryPage.tsx:122 — TalkCard <a> + text-foreground per FRAC-42 pairing.
- StoryPage.tsx:174 — byline text-sm → .text-meta.
- OriginStory.tsx:9 — wrapper text-sm md:text-base font-light → .text-body.
- NeighborhoodCampusDiagram.tsx:81 — stats <ul> text-xs md:text-sm → .text-body (color text-foreground/90 preserved).
- NeighborhoodCampusDiagram.tsx:109 — CenterNode title font-serif text-lg md:text-xl tracking-tight → .text-subtitle italic (italic preserved per audit instruction).
- NeighborhoodCampusDiagram.tsx:112 — CenterNode subtitle adds .text-meta with text-[10px] md:text-xs side-by-side size override.

Token decision (recorded in plan): NO new tokens. Story palette cluster (#D4BA58 / #8A7A20 / alpha variants) preserved verbatim per audit's deferred choice between options (a)/(b)/(c). audit-gaps.md Story entry (Date 2026-06-09) is the durable record from FRAC-26.

Verification:
- pnpm typecheck: clean exit.
- pnpm test: 4 failed / 143 passed — exact baseline match (footer FRAC-88 italic, footer Jacquard, navigation mobile labels, neighborhood min-h-screen). No regressions.
- Palette grep: 9 hits in StoryPage.tsx, 5 hits in NCD — matches pre-PR count (no migrations occurred).
- DESIGN.md / audit doc / audit-prompt / audit-gaps: zero diff from origin/frac-26-audit-story.
- src/index.css: zero diff.

375px mental walkthrough:
- OriginStory body: text-sm (14px) → text-base (16px), weight 300 → 400 — noticeably bigger paragraphs. Short narrative, no overflow expected.
- NCD pillar stats: text-xs (12px) → text-base (16px) — LARGEST visible delta. Need eyes-on at 375px to confirm no overflow inside w-[45%] PillarCards in the circular layout, especially for multi-line stats like "5 third-spaces hosting 100s of classes…". Flagged in plan open question #1.
- TalkCard byline: now JBM uppercase chrome label (was Inter normal-case). Reads as chrome metadata.
- CenterNode logotype: slightly larger italic Fraunces, slightly lighter weight.
- CenterNode subtitle: now JBM uppercase ("A NEIGHBORHOOD CAMPUS / FOUNDED IN 2021").

No dev server validation performed (mental walkthrough only).

Review (fresh context, cold read of plan + audit + git diff).

VERDICT: PASS. Move to done.

Reviewed:
- Plan: .lattice/plans/task_01KTJQF0YX7V5688XP73BVXZPS.md (full).
- Audit spec: .lattice/notes/audits/story-audit.md (full).
- Diff: 12 lines changed across src/pages/StoryPage.tsx, src/components/sections/OriginStory.tsx, src/components/sections/NeighborhoodCampusDiagram.tsx.
- pnpm typecheck: clean.
- pnpm test: 4 failed / 143 passed — exact baseline match (footer FRAC-88 italic, footer Jacquard, navigation mobile labels, neighborhood min-h-screen). No regressions.

Audit row fidelity (per-row):
1. StoryPage:211 .text-display — EXACT no-op (audit) — no edit (correct).
2. StoryPage:169 .text-subtitle — already canonical (audit) — no edit (correct).
3. StoryPage:174 byline — MIGRATE .text-meta — line edited as expected.
4. StoryPage:155 .text-eyebrow — EXACT no-op — no edit (correct).
5. StoryPage:179, 224 PretextParagraph — GAP-DEFERRED — no edit (correct, Lab gap covers).
6. StoryPage:122 TalkCard FRAC-42 pairing — text-foreground added on the same node as bg-background/border-border. Pairing satisfied.
7. StoryPage:164 ArrowUpRight text-muted-foreground — EXACT no-op (correct).
8. StoryPage:201 <main> text-foreground + selection — EXACT no-op (correct).
9. StoryPage:202 FractalPattern — EXCLUDED (correct).
10. StoryPage palette cluster (18/137/146/151/156/189/201/209) — GAP-DEFERRED per Token decision — no edits (correct).
11. OriginStory:9 wrapper — MIGRATE .text-body — line edited; drops text-sm md:text-base AND font-light per spec.
12. NCD:74 emoji — JUSTIFY — no edit (correct).
13. NCD:77 .text-subtitle — already canonical, NEAR but utility in use — no edit (correct).
14. NCD:81 stats <ul> — MIGRATE .text-body — line edited; preserves space-y-1, leading-snug, text-foreground/90 (color EXACT alpha preserved correctly).
15. NCD:83-89 inner spans — JUSTIFY — folded into row 14 (correct).
16. NCD:109 CenterNode title — MIGRATE .text-subtitle italic — italic explicitly preserved per audit instruction (.text-subtitle resets font-style; explicit italic re-asserts).
17. NCD:112 CenterNode subtitle — MIGRATE .text-meta with size override side-by-side — both classes present as audit specified.
18. NCD palette cluster (57/58/66/101/165) — GAP-DEFERRED — no edits (correct).
19. GalleryImage:24 bg-muted — EXACT no-op — no edit (correct).
20. PhotoGallery:23 — JUSTIFY — no edit (correct).

Token decision: correctly deferred. The audit doc enumerates options (a)/(b)/(c) WITHOUT choosing; declaring tokens would be an unauthorized system change per the FRAC-27 brief. The implementation correctly executes de-facto option (b) without amending DESIGN.md, leaving the audit-gaps Story entry from FRAC-26 as the durable human-decision record.

Hard-rule audit:
- No edits to DESIGN.md, story-audit.md, audit-prompt.md, audit-gaps.md (diff confirms zero changes from origin/frac-26-audit-story).
- No edits to src/index.css.
- No edits to PhotoGallery.tsx, GalleryImage.tsx, FractalPattern.tsx, Navbar.tsx, Footer.tsx, SectorHeader.tsx, button.tsx, storyPhotos.ts (audit out of scope).
- No sibling-territory edits (.claude/, notes/.recovered/, notes/.tmp/, etc.).

PRD re-check (per CLAUDE.md mandatory): FRAC-22 PRD declares Story as a top-level page; mobile-first is non-negotiable. All migrations preserve mobile-first sizing (every utility used is mobile-first responsive: .text-body pins text-base, .text-subtitle uses text-xl md:text-2xl, .text-meta uses text-sm). The body size-ups at 375px are aligned with the same mobile-first body pattern Lab/Campus migrations already absorbed; no PRD discrepancy.

Mobile 375px considerations:
- NCD pillar stats text-xs → text-base is the largest visible change. PillarCards mobile width is w-[45%] in the circular layout. The longest single stat ("100% job placement rate of engineers from 3-month programming bootcamp") will wrap to more lines at text-base than at text-xs; container is rounded-xl with p-4 md:p-5 and no fixed height, so wrapping is graceful. No layout break expected, but worth eyes-on by a human at 375px post-merge.
- OriginStory paragraphs are short narrative; text-base size-up is comfortable.
- TalkCard byline is short ("Author, Year" pattern); JBM uppercase reads cleanly.

Commit hygiene: 4 logical commits (lattice catchup + 3 src commits), descriptive subjects with FRAC-27: prefix, bodies explain visible deltas.

No implementation-level rework needed. No plan-level rework needed. Move to done.
